--- 
title: "Guide to Data Privacy"
author: "Data Privacy project team at Utrecht University"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: bookdown::gitbook
split_by: section
documentclass: book
bibliography: [book.bib, packages.bib]
biblio-style: apalike
link-citations: yes
github-repo: nehamoopen/bookdown-demo
description: "This is a minimal example of using the bookdown package to write a book. The output format for this example is bookdown::gitbook."
---

# Preface

This is a demo of the upcoming _Guide to Data Privacy_ built using the bookdown package in R.

During the next team meeting, please explore the structure of the book and provide your thoughts and input on:

* improvements
* needs & requirements
* ideas
* structure 

Please note your comments in the meeting notes document in MS Teams. Or better yet, open issues in the GitHub repo! 

This demo was built using the minimal example feature in R Markdown and bookdown (https://github.com/rstudio/bookdown). Neha will close this demo repository and build the actual guide from scratch.
